title: BSF Retreat 2026
text:
Hello there folks 👋




Thank you for your patience




We have done our extensive market research… 📈






This individual has been kept anonymous for privacy reasons.





And after applying our constraints… 🧮









We have finalised the location for Leaders Retreat 2026 🎉




That’s right! We will be back at Cowes’ Phillip Island 🐄🐧












The main house will be the same 🏠




But we have changed up the other house 🧰




More details to come…




Click on this handsome lad 👇 (To avoid confusion for Pinky, click on Sze’s photo)

title: Important Info
text:
⚠️⚠️⚠️ Under Construction ⚠️⚠️⚠️



Important Notices

Linen, Pillowcases and Towels are NOT provided. Please make sure to BYO.
As a condition of stay, please note there will be no loud music after 10pm.
